ddterm@amezin.github.com./com/github/amezin/ddterm/:
[/]
background-color='#ffffff'
bold-color='#000000'
bold-color-same-as-fg=true
bold-is-bright=false

cursor-colors-set=false

highlight-colors-set=false

scrollback-unlimited=true

use-theme-colors=true

custom-hot-corners-extended@G-dH.github../org/gnome/shell/extensions/custom-hot-c:
[misc]
show-osd-monitor-indexes=false
supported-active-extensions=['arcmenu']

[monitor-0-bottom-left-6]
ctrl=true

[monitor-0-bottom-right-0]
action='lock-screen'

[monitor-0-bottom-right-6]
ctrl=true

[monitor-0-top-left-0]
action='show-overview'

[monitor-0-top-left-6]
ctrl=true

[monitor-0-top-right-6]
ctrl=true

[monitor-1-top-left-6]
ctrl=true

keybindings./org/gnome/settings-daemon/plugins/media:
[/]
custom-keybindings=['/org/gnome/settings-daemon/plugins/media-keys/custom-keybindings/custom0/']

[custom-keybindings/PopLaunch1]
binding='Launch1'
command='gnome-control-center wifi'
name='WiFi'

[custom-keybindings/custom0]
binding='<Control>space'
command='ulauncher-toggle'
name='ulauncher toggle'

tweaks./org/gnome/desktop/interface/:
[/]
clock-format='24h'
clock-show-weekday=true
color-scheme='prefer-light'
enable-animations=true
enable-hot-corners=true
font-antialiasing='grayscale'
font-hinting='slight'
gtk-theme='Yaru'
icon-theme='Yaru'
locate-pointer=true
show-battery-percentage=true
